name: jira-worklogs
title: Jira Worklogs
description: Track your time with timers and automatically sync your worklogs directly to Jira.
author: nicolae_ciocan

commands.name: picker
commands.title: Pick Jira Ticket
commands.subtitle: Add a ticket to today's list and start tracking time
commands.description: Choose a Jira ticket, add it to today's list and start or stop a timer to track your work

commands.name: worklogs
commands.title: View worklogs
commands.subtitle: See your tracked time at a glance
commands.description: View all worklogs for the current month

commands.name: menubar
commands.title: Jira Worklogs Menubar
commands.subtitle: Show your worklogs in the menu bar
commands.description: Enable a menu bar view to quickly see today's tracked time and access your Jira worklogs anytime

commands.name: calendar
commands.title: View Worklogs Calendar
commands.subtitle: View your worklogs in calendar view
commands.description: View your tracked time in a clear calendar overview

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
